Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Sonitrol Franchise LLC,'s Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as it seeks further responses and production of documents as to Request For Production Numbers 8, 12, 13, 14-28, 30, 31, 33-58, 60-75, 77-86, 98-105, 107, 108, 110, and 111 as the motion is not timely as it was brought more than 45 days after the responses were served. This portion of the motion was brought without substantial justification.

The motion is granted in part as to Interrogatory Numbers 1-10. The interrogatories are objectionable as they seek the identity of persons who may testify as it calls for work product. The motion is granted as it seeks the identity of persons with knowledge. The remaining objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The motion is granted as to Numbers 11-21 and 23-27. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken.

Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order.

Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,200, payable within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
